settings.heading: Business NBN availability and next steps
settings.text: Check business address availability, understand support boundaries and confirm the right next step before ordering or activation.

Enter a business address to check the next available support pathway. Availability, speed tiers, activation timing, installation requirements and provider approval must be confirmed before relying on a plan.
settings.manual_text: If the checker cannot confirm serviceability, RBP can review the address, business context and available next steps manually.
settings.aside_text: Availability, speed tiers, activation timing, installation requirements and provider approval can vary by address and provider. Confirm these details before choosing or activating a plan.
